name: Clean & Remesh
description: Denoises AI-generated meshes with Laplacian smoothing, then remeshes into clean quad/triangle topology using Instant Meshes.

params_schema.label: Denoise strength
params_schema.tooltip: Laplacian smoothing iterations before remesh. Removes AI mesh noise and imperfections. 0 = disabled.

params_schema.label: Target face count
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count for remesh. -1 = auto (preserves original density).

params_schema.label: Output topology
params_schema.tooltip: Quads for animation/subdivision. Triangles for game-ready meshes.

params_schema.label: Crease angle (°)
params_schema.tooltip: Preserves sharp edges above this angle. 0 = fully smooth, 25 = recommended for AI meshes.

params_schema.label: Remesh smoothing
params_schema.tooltip: Instant Meshes internal smoothing passes. 2–4 is optimal.
